questionHtml: Outline one example of an active management strategy employed in the context of in situ conservation.
markschemeHtml:
a. name of strategy ✔ 

b. detail of the strategy ✔

example:
a. anti-poaching restrictions within a nature reserve

b. patrolling of the reserve to enforce restrictions

Accept only the first stated strategy if several are listed.

The outline must match the strategy.

meta.title: Outline one example of an active management strategy employed in the context of in situ conservation.
